title: Alphabet Plates
description: Adds simple items with numbers and letters.  For use with labeling things.
body:
This mod adds items bearing the alphabet, numbers 0-9, and !?\
**These are just items, not blocks**, but they can be placed in Item Frames to create labels.\
I personally use them for frequencies for the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod's Redstone Link.

Blank Plates are crafted like so:\
![A crafting recipe.  Three Smooth Stone Slabs in a horizontal line produce 16 Blank Plates.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7557ead7ad0aee203f369be49f3a908be49b9b2.png)

From there, all Plate items may be switched between using the Stonecutter.

If you have another mod that uses this recipe, I would recommend the mod [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph) to resolve conflicts.

![An image depicting all the plates together](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JwYMh0oS/images/dedef2afbc64aca138f9568d0607fa949e42d2a6.png)

Made with MCreator
